aesthetic_notes: Premium private investment academy. Institutional finance aesthetic (BlackRock, Goldman Sachs Private Wealth). No startup SaaS vibe, no crypto neon. Clean, grid-based, dark midnight navy with platinum/ivory text and sparse gold accents.

surfaces_and_shadows.input_style: bg-[#050914] border border-[#212A3F] text-[#F4F6F8] focus:border-[#D4AF37] focus:ring-1 focus:ring-[#D4AF37] transition-all

sidebar.inactive_item: text-[#9AA4B6] hover:bg-[#0C1222] hover:text-[#F4F6F8] border-l-2 border-transparent transition-colors

brand_logo.description: Hampton Crest Academy Heraldic Crest Logo (Navy & Gold)

login_background.description: Modern dark architectural high-rise building at night, fitting institutional finance.

empty_state.style: flex flex-col items-center justify-center p-12 text-center border border-dashed border-[#212A3F] rounded-sm bg-[#0C1222]/50

kpi_card.style: p-6 bg-[#0C1222] border border-[#212A3F] rounded-sm flex flex-col justify-between
kpi_card.label: text-[#9AA4B6] text-xs uppercase tracking-widest font-semibold

login_screen.branding_panel: relative bg-[#050914] overflow-hidden flex flex-col items-center justify-center p-12 border-r border-[#212A3F]
login_screen.form_panel: flex flex-col justify-center px-8 sm:px-16 lg:px-24 bg-[#050914]

instructions_to_main_agent: Use standard pure Tailwind for marketing/login layouts. Use Shadcn components for complex app UI elements (tables, tabs, dialogs) but override their default styles to match the institutional dark theme.
Borders should be sharp (rounded-none or rounded-sm). Do not use soft, large border-radiuses.
Include 'data-testid' on all interactive elements (buttons, inputs, nav links) as per requirements.
Ensure typography uses Manrope. Pull it from Google Fonts in index.css if not present.
Implement JWT Auth context placeholder for login to work and redirect to /dashboard.
Build empty states for Research, Education, Reports, etc., using the defined empty_state specs (no mock data, just structure).
Sidebar should have a collapsible state for desktop and drawer for mobile. Use Lucide or Phosphor icons.
